messages.content:
You are asked to perform a 1-back test of your working memory. You will see a sequence of letters. Compare the current letter to the letter one letter prior to it (if it exists). Respond with ‘+’ (no quotation marks, just the plus sign) if the two letters both exist and are identical, and ‘-’ (no quotation marks, just the minus sign) otherwise. Before you answer, give the prior letter that you are comparing the current letter to, if one exists. The sequence will be presented one letter at a time. Now begins the task.

t
No prior letter to compare to, first letter in sequence.
h
No prior letter to compare to, first letter in the sequence.
b
No match to the prior letter 'h', respond with '-'.
n
No match to the prior letter 'b', respond with '-'.
b
Match to the prior letter 'n', respond with '+'.
b
No match to the prior letter 'b', respond with '-'.
h
No match to the prior letter 'b', respond with '-'.
h
Match to the prior letter 'h', respond with '+'.
o
No match to the prior letter 'h', respond with '-'.
o
Match to the prior letter 'o', respond with '+'.
c
No match to the prior letter 'o', respond with '-'.
c
Match to the prior letter 'c', respond with '+'.
c
No match to the prior letter 'c', respond with '-'.
j
No match to the prior letter 'c', respond with '-'.
j
Match to the prior letter 'j', respond with '+'.
j
No match to the prior letter 'j', respond with '-'.
